{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Senior Business Development Manager",
  "description": "Elevare Human Solutions Ltd is a leading Human Resource and recruitment solutions company committed to connecting top-tier talent with employers across Nigeria and internationally. We specialize in providing comprehensive HR consulting, talent acquisition, and workforce management services for diverse industries. Our mission is to deliver tailored recruitment solutions that support organizational growth while fostering career opportunities for skilled professionals. At Elevare, we leverage industry expertise, cutting-edge technology, and a robust network to ensure seamless hiring processes and exceptional candidate experiences. Join us as we bridge the gap between talent and opportunity, creating impactful partnerships that drive success.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Business Development Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Senior Business Development Manager will drive business growth within the oil and gas sector by identifying, developing, and securing high-value opportunities.
	The role requires deep industry knowledge, strong commercial acumen, and established relationships within key oil and gas organizations, including NNPC, Shell, and other major operators.


Key Responsibilities

Business Development &amp; Opportunity Identification:


	Identify and pursue new business opportunities within the oil and gas sector.
	Develop and execute strategic plans to penetrate target clients, including NNPC, Shell, and other IOCs/indigenous operators.
	Build and maintain a robust pipeline of qualified opportunities.


Client Relationship Management:


	Leverage existing network and relationships within oil and gas companies to generate business leads.
	Establish and maintain strong relationships with key decision-makers.


Tendering &amp; Proposal Management:


	Lead and coordinate preparation of technical and commercial proposals.
	Review RFQs, ITTs, and bid documents to ensure compliance and competitiveness.


Market Intelligence &amp; Strategy:


	Monitor industry trends and competitor activities.
	Provide strategic insights for business positioning and growth.


Contract Negotiation &amp; Closure:


	Lead negotiations and drive closure of contracts.
	Ensure alignment with company&#39;s commercial objectives.


Qualifications &amp; Experience


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Engineering, Business Administration, or related field.
	8&ndash;12 years of experience in Business Development within the oil and gas industry.
	Strong, verifiable network within NNPC, Shell, and other operators.
	Proven track record of winning contracts.


Key Competencies:


	Strong commercial and negotiation skills
	Deep understanding of the oil and gas sector
	Strategic thinking and market positioning
	High-level stakeholder engagement


Additional Requirements:


	Must have strong industry contacts within oil and gas companies.
	Ability to operate independently at a senior level.
	Age range: Not more than 40 years.


Benefits


	Salary: N1,500,000 per month
	Health Maintenance Organization (HMO) coverage
	Contributory Pension Scheme in line with statutory requirements
	13th Month Salary
	Other benefits as applicable under company policy.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV&nbsp;to:&nbsp;elevarehumansolutions@gmail.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the email.&nbsp;",
  "datePosted": "2026-04-16",
  "validThrough": "2026-05-17",
  "employmentType": "Full-Time",

    "@type": "Organization",

  },

Senior Business Development Manager Job at Elevare Human Solutions Limited




        
    

        
        Elevare Human Solutions Ltd is a leading Human Resource and recruitment solutions company committed to connecting top-tier talent with employers across Nigeria and internationally. We specialize in providing comprehensive HR consulting, talent acquisition, and workforce management services for diverse industries. Our mission is to deliver tailored recruitment solutions that support organizational growth while fostering career opportunities for skilled professionals. At Elevare, we leverage industry expertise, cutting-edge technology, and a robust network to ensure seamless hiring processes and exceptional candidate experiences. Join us as we bridge the gap between talent and opportunity, creating impactful partnerships that drive success.
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    



We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Senior Business Development Manager

Job Location: Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time

Job Summary


	The Senior Business Development Manager will drive business growth within the oil and gas sector by identifying, developing, and securing high-value opportunities.
	The role requires deep industry knowledge, strong commercial acumen, and established relationships within key oil and gas organizations, including NNPC, Shell, and other major operators.


Key Responsibilities

Business Development & Opportunity Identification:


	Identify and pursue new business opportunities within the oil and gas sector.
	Develop and execute strategic plans to penetrate target clients, including NNPC, Shell, and other IOCs/indigenous operators.
	Build and maintain a robust pipeline of qualified opportunities.


Client Relationship Management:


	Leverage existing network and relationships within oil and gas companies to generate business leads.
	Establish and maintain strong relationships with key decision-makers.


Tendering & Proposal Management:


	Lead and coordinate preparation of technical and commercial proposals.
	Review RFQs, ITTs, and bid documents to ensure compliance and competitiveness.


Market Intelligence & Strategy:


	Monitor industry trends and competitor activities.
	Provide strategic insights for business positioning and growth.


Contract Negotiation & Closure:


	Lead negotiations and drive closure of contracts.
	Ensure alignment with company's commercial objectives.


Qualifications & Experience


	Bachelor’s degree in Engineering, Business Administration, or related field.
	8–12 years of experience in Business Development within the oil and gas industry.
	Strong, verifiable network within NNPC, Shell, and other operators.
	Proven track record of winning contracts.


Key Competencies:


	Strong commercial and negotiation skills
	Deep understanding of the oil and gas sector
	Strategic thinking and market positioning
	High-level stakeholder engagement


Additional Requirements:


	Must have strong industry contacts within oil and gas companies.
	Ability to operate independently at a senior level.
	Age range: Not more than 40 years.


Benefits


	Salary: N1,500,000 per month
	Health Maintenance Organization (HMO) coverage
	Contributory Pension Scheme in line with statutory requirements
	13th Month Salary
	Other benefits as applicable under company policy.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the email.     

    

        Click here to Apply

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Assistant Admin Manager",
  "description": "Applicant Recruiters Limited - We are a growing business specializing in FMCG. We are committed to providing top-notch products and exceptional customer service.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Assistant Admin Manager

Job Location:&nbsp;Ikeja (Alausa), Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Company: Beverage Manufacturing Company

Job Summary


	As part of our expansion, we are looking for an energetic and motivated individual to join our team as a Assistant Admin Manager.
	We are seeking a highly organized and proactive Assistant Admin Manager to support the daily administrative operations of the organization.
	The ideal candidate will assist in managing administrative staff, ensuring efficient office operations, and maintaining a productive work environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Assist in overseeing and coordinating administrative activities within the organization
	Support the Admin Manager in implementing policies and procedures
	Supervise administrative staff and ensure tasks are completed efficiently
	Manage office supplies, equipment, and vendor relationships
	Coordinate meetings, schedules, and internal communications
	Maintain accurate records, reports, and documentation
	Ensure compliance with company policies and regulatory requirements
	Handle correspondence and respond to inquiries professionally
	Assist in budgeting and monitoring administrative expenses
	Carry out activities related to Operation - Public Relations and Government.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Business Administration, Management, or related fields
	3 - 5 years of experience in an administrative or supervisory role
	Strong organizational and multitasking skills
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint)
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team
	Strong problem-solving and decision-making abilities.


Preferred Qualifications:


	Experience in office management or administrative leadership
	Knowledge of basic accounting or budgeting processes.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Intrested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to:&nbsp;applicantrecruiters@gmail.com&nbsp;using&nbsp;&ldquo;Assistant Admin Manager&quot; as the subject of the email.",

Assistant Admin Manager Job at Applicant Recruiters Limited




        
    

        
        Applicant Recruiters Limited - We are a growing business specializing in FMCG. We are committed to providing top-notch products and exceptional customer service.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Assistant Admin Manager

Job Location: Ikeja (Alausa), Lagos
Employment Type: Full-time
Company: Beverage Manufacturing Company

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	As part of our expansion, we are looking for an energetic and motivated individual to join our team as a Assistant Admin Manager.
	We are seeking a highly organized and proactive Assistant Admin Manager to support the daily administrative operations of the organization.
	The ideal candidate will assist in managing administrative staff, ensuring efficient office operations, and maintaining a productive work environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Assist in overseeing and coordinating administrative activities within the organization
	Support the Admin Manager in implementing policies and procedures
	Supervise administrative staff and ensure tasks are completed efficiently
	Manage office supplies, equipment, and vendor relationships
	Coordinate meetings, schedules, and internal communications
	Maintain accurate records, reports, and documentation
	Ensure compliance with company policies and regulatory requirements
	Handle correspondence and respond to inquiries professionally
	Assist in budgeting and monitoring administrative expenses
	Carry out activities related to Operation - Public Relations and Government.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration, Management, or related fields
	3 - 5 years of experience in an administrative or supervisory role
	Strong organizational and multitasking skills
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint)
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team
	Strong problem-solving and decision-making abilities.


Preferred Qualifications:


	Experience in office management or administrative leadership
	Knowledge of basic accounting or budgeting processes.


Method of Application 
Intrested and qualified candidates should send their Resume to: [email protected] using “Assistant Admin Manager" as the subject of the email.    

    

        Click here to Apply

Job Position: Assistant Admin Manager

Employment Type: Full-time
Company: Beverage Manufacturing Company

Job Summary


	As part of our expansion, we are looking for an energetic and motivated individual to join our team as a Assistant Admin Manager .
	We are seeking a highly organized and proactiveAssistant Admin Managerto support the daily administrative operations of the organization.
	The ideal candidate will assist in managing administrative staff, ensuring efficient office operations, and maintaining a productive work environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Assist in overseeing and coordinating administrative activities within the organization
	Support the Admin Manager in implementing policies and procedures
	Supervise administrative staff and ensure tasks are completed efficiently
	Manage office supplies, equipment, and vendor relationships
	Coordinate meetings, schedules, and internal communications
	Maintain accurate records, reports, and documentation
	Ensure compliance with company policies and regulatory requirements
	Handle correspondence and respond to inquiries professionally
	Assist in budgeting and monitoring administrative expenses
	Carry out activities related to Operation - Public Relations and Government.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s Degree in Business Administration, Management, or related fields
	3 - 5 years of experience in an administrative or supervisory role
	Strong organizational and multitasking skills
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint)
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team
	Strong problem-solving and decision-making abilities.


Preferred Qualifications:


	Experience in office management or administrative leadership
	Knowledge of basic accounting or budgeting processes.


Method of Application&nbsp;

Assistant Admin Manager Job at Applicant Recruiters Limited




        
    

        
        Applicant Recruiters Limited - We are a growing business specializing in FMCG. We are committed to providing top-notch products and exceptional customer service.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Assistant Admin Manager

Job Location: Sagamu, Ogun
Employment Type: Full-time
Company: Beverage Manufacturing Company

Job Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	As part of our expansion, we are looking for an energetic and motivated individual to join our team as a Assistant Admin Manager .
	We are seeking a highly organized and proactiveAssistant Admin Managerto support the daily administrative operations of the organization.
	The ideal candidate will assist in managing administrative staff, ensuring efficient office operations, and maintaining a productive work environment.


Key Responsibilities


	Assist in overseeing and coordinating administrative activities within the organization
	Support the Admin Manager in implementing policies and procedures
	Supervise administrative staff and ensure tasks are completed efficiently
	Manage office supplies, equipment, and vendor relationships
	Coordinate meetings, schedules, and internal communications
	Maintain accurate records, reports, and documentation
	Ensure compliance with company policies and regulatory requirements
	Handle correspondence and respond to inquiries professionally
	Assist in budgeting and monitoring administrative expenses
	Carry out activities related to Operation - Public Relations and Government.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s Degree in Business Administration, Management, or related fields
	3 - 5 years of experience in an administrative or supervisory role
	Strong organizational and multitasking skills
	Excellent communication and interpersonal skills
	Proficiency in Microsoft Office Suite (Word, Excel, PowerPoint)
	Ability to work independently and as part of a team
	Strong problem-solving and decision-making abilities.


Preferred Qualifications:


	Experience in office management or administrative leadership
	Knowledge of basic accounting or budgeting processes.


Method of Application

{
  "@context": "https://schema.org",
  "@type": "JobPosting",
  "title": "Junior Accounts Officer",
  "description": "NeoHomes Limited is a leading real estate company with a vision to become a globally recognized brand. We&#39;re seeking an experienced Executive General Manager to join our leadership team and drive business growth, innovation, and excellence.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Junior Accounts Officer

Job Location:&nbsp;Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Summary


	The Junior Accounting Officer will support the finance team in maintaining accurate financial records, processing transactions, and ensuring compliance with internal controls.
	This role is ideal for early-career professionals with foundational accounting knowledge and hands-on experience using QuickBooks.


Key Responsibilities


	Record daily financial transactions and maintain accurate ledgers.
	Assist in accounts payable and receivable processes.
	Reconcile bank statements and resolve discrepancies.
	Support month-end and year-end closing activities.
	Prepare basic financial reports and summaries.
	Maintain proper documentation and filing of financial records.
	Assist with audits and compliance requirements.
	Ensure adherence to company financial policies and procedures.


Requirements


	Bachelor&rsquo;s degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field.
	0&ndash;2 years of relevant accounting experience.
	Proficiency in QuickBooks (mandatory).
	Basic understanding of accounting principles and financial reporting.
	Strong attention to detail and accuracy.
	Good analytical and problem-solving skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel.
	Strong organizational and time management skills.


Key Competencies:


	Integrity and confidentiality
	Attention to detail
	Numerical accuracy
	Communication skills
	Willingness to learn and adapt
	Initiative and progressive thinking


Optional / Advantage:


	Progress toward professional certification (ICAN/ACCA)
	Experience in a structured finance environment.


Method of Application&nbsp;
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to:&nbsp;humanresources@neohomesltd.com&nbsp;using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.",

Junior Accounts Officer Job at NeoHomes Limited




        
    

        
        NeoHomes Limited is a leading real estate company with a vision to become a globally recognized brand. We're seeking an experienced Executive General Manager to join our leadership team and drive business growth, innovation, and excellence.

We are recruiting to fill the position below:

Job Position: Junior Accounts Officer

Job Location: Abuja (FCT)
Employment Type: Full-time

Role Summary
     

        



     (adsbygoogle = window.adsbygoogle || []).push({});
    
    




	The Junior Accounting Officer will support the finance team in maintaining accurate financial records, processing transactions, and ensuring compliance with internal controls.
	This role is ideal for early-career professionals with foundational accounting knowledge and hands-on experience using QuickBooks.


Key Responsibilities


	Record daily financial transactions and maintain accurate ledgers.
	Assist in accounts payable and receivable processes.
	Reconcile bank statements and resolve discrepancies.
	Support month-end and year-end closing activities.
	Prepare basic financial reports and summaries.
	Maintain proper documentation and filing of financial records.
	Assist with audits and compliance requirements.
	Ensure adherence to company financial policies and procedures.


Requirements


	Bachelor’s degree in Accounting, Finance, or a related field.
	0–2 years of relevant accounting experience.
	Proficiency in QuickBooks (mandatory).
	Basic understanding of accounting principles and financial reporting.
	Strong attention to detail and accuracy.
	Good analytical and problem-solving skills.
	Proficiency in Microsoft Excel.
	Strong organizational and time management skills.


Key Competencies:


	Integrity and confidentiality
	Attention to detail
	Numerical accuracy
	Communication skills
	Willingness to learn and adapt
	Initiative and progressive thinking


Optional / Advantage:


	Progress toward professional certification (ICAN/ACCA)
	Experience in a structured finance environment.


Method of Application 
Interested and qualified candidates should send their CV to: [email protected] using the Job Position as the subject of the mail.
